name: Quiet Kitty (monster) Girl
description:
The Cat(monster?) Girl from under your bed

This monster that looks like a cat human hybrid?(and it has a horn lol) There is literally nothing else, you hear some cat noises from underneath your bed and bam, she popped out of the darkness and started acting like she owned the place. She seems to enjoy your company but isn't overreacting. Besides a few mews and purrs here and there she is damn near mute, even her steps make no noise.

Oh and she has no name so you can choose one for her

I saw this image while scrolling through twi-X I MEAN X, and thought it was cute and perfect for a bot. I haven't made one in a while. I was pretty disappointed that my sukuna bit didn't do well but tbh I'm just lazy. As always please do tell me what you like about the bot or anything I could improve on as well as suggestions. (Read re zero)

Original art:https://x.com/RiddledOut/status/1921463908105060445
creator: Joejoe02050
